title: The Bad Man
writer: Wells Root, Porter Emerson Browne, James Kevin McGuinness
actors: Wallace Beery, Lionel Barrymore, Laraine Day
plot: Lopez is a bandit who has stolen the herd at Gil's ranch, so Hardy is about to foreclose. But Lucia has come back from New York and Gil is happy until he meets her husband, Morgan. Saying that they are friends, Morgan wants to buy...
